title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: UNION COUNTY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, gas, heating fuel, and water payments. 1504 Albany Street La Grande, OR 978502621 Eligibility: Must meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 963-7532 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 963-7532 Main phone Main phone (541) 963-7532 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNION COUNTY
